# DESIGN BRIEF: NoTimeMover (PRE-PIVOT — see PROJECT-BRIEF.md for current direction)
**Generated by Design Brief Agent | Drivn.AI**
**Date:** 2026-05-11
**Status:** Superseded by client scope (PDF in `client-scope/`). Kept for reference.

---

## Project Overview

**Business:** NoTimeMover — residential and commercial moving services
**Industry:** Moving & relocation (local + long-distance)
**Target Audience:** Homeowners and renters, ages 25–55, planning a move. They are stressed, time-pressed, and value speed + reliability above price. Often decide on a mover within 24 hours of searching.
**Website Goal:** Generate quote requests (primary), build trust and credibility, communicate services clearly, make booking feel fast and stress-free.
**Brand Identity:** Faith-based ("Galatians 5:13 — Serve one another through love"), personal, warm, fast. NOT corporate. NOT cold tech. NOT generic.

---

## STEP 1: LOGO ANALYSIS

**Logo Description:** Brown circular icon (moving-related), "NoTime" in dark brown, "Moving" in orange (#E87020), clean modern aesthetic, faith tagline "Galatians 5:13."

**Extracted Colors:**
- Brand Orange: `#E87020`
- Dark Brown (logo text): approx `#3B1F0A`

**Style Assessment:**
- Modern but grounded — not trendy or flashy
- The circular icon with brown feels trustworthy and community-oriented
- Orange signals speed, energy, warmth, urgency — ideal for a service business
- The faith tagline elevates it above commodity movers; it's a values statement

**Complementary Colors Recommended:**
- Cream/Linen backgrounds to soften the warmth
- Amber accent to complement orange at lighter saturation
- Near-black brown for text (not pure black — keeps warmth)

---

## STEP 2: COMPETITOR ANALYSIS

### Bellhop (getbellhops.com)
- **Design approach:** Modern SaaS-style, customer-centric, conversion-optimized
- **Color scheme:** White/neutral backgrounds, accent colors subtle
- **Typography:** Clean sans-serif hierarchy, functional over decorative
- **Hero:** "A better moving experience starts here" — dual CTAs (quote + phone), video play button element
- **Components:** 6 modular service cards with icons, 3-step process timeline, testimonial carousel, extensive location grid
- **Trust signals:** 300K+ moves, 20K+ reviews, 4.8★, background-checked movers, $0 down, transparent pricing, QR time tracking
- **Navigation:** Sticky, logo left, phone number right, "Get estimate" CTA
- **Imagery:** Professional photography, branded truck imagery, SVG service icons
- **Animations:** Subtle functional hover states; video background element

### Moved (moved.com)
- **Design approach:** B2B SaaS platform targeting property managers — not a direct competitor but informative
- **Color scheme:** White + muted grays/blues, enterprise-clean
- **Typography:** Large headline "The future of resident moves" — bold, benefit-driven
- **Components:** "Old way vs. Moved way" comparison, 4-step process flow, metric tiles, partner logos
- **Trust signals:** 4,000+ properties, 1M+ units, 96%+ engagement rate, 3+ hours saved per move
- **Animations:** Minimal, static-focused
- **Note:** Designed for enterprise; NoTimeMover's warmth would be a direct contrast

### Unpakt (unpakt.com)
- **Design approach:** Price-comparison marketplace for moving companies
- **Key insight:** Users come here to compare quotes — it's a high-intent, price-aware audience
- **Components:** Calendar-based booking flow, star ratings, comparison grid, multi-step quote form
- **Trust signals:** Reviewer stars, verification badges, moving-specific filter icons
- **Note:** Unpakt represents the commoditized layer of the market. NoTimeMover should position above this via trust and brand.

---

### Cross-Competitor Patterns (What Everyone Does)
1. Prominent phone number in navigation
2. Hero CTA form or button above the fold
3. "How it works" 3-step process section
4. Service cards with icons
5. Stats bar (number of moves, reviews, star rating)
6. Customer testimonials with names and locations
7. Clean, professional aesthetic

### What the Best One Does Differently (Bellhop)
- Technology angle: QR tracking, digital dashboard, real-time updates
- $0 down booking removes risk
- National scale signals reliability
- 40+ cities shows legitimacy

### Gaps to Exploit (NoTimeMover Opportunities)
1. **Faith-based identity** — zero competitors use this; it creates instant memorability and emotional connection
2. **Warmth in visual direction** — competitors feel like SaaS products; a golden-hour video hero is a category differentiator
3. **Speed as brand promise** — "NoTime" in the name is an asset; lean into "We're fast because your time matters"
4. **Human face** — show your team, your faces; personal moving companies that show real people convert significantly better than faceless brands
5. **60-second quote promise** — competitors say "get a quote"; NoTime can say "free quote in 60 seconds"
6. **Local community story** — big national brands can't do this; local = personal = trusted

---

## 1. COLOR PALETTE

### Brand Palette

| Role | Name | Hex |
|------|------|-----|
| Primary | Brand Orange | `#E87020` |
| Primary Dark | Burnt Sienna | `#C55E15` |
| Secondary | Espresso Brown | `#3B1F0A` |
| Secondary Mid | Mahogany | `#6B3A1F` |
| Accent Light | Soft Amber | `#F9A55A` |

### Neutrals

| Role | Name | Hex |
|------|------|-----|
| Background | Warm Cream | `#FAF7F2` |
| Surface | Linen | `#F3EDE4` |
| Border | Sand | `#EDE4D8` |
| Body Text | Near Black Brown | `#1C1208` |
| Secondary Text | Warm Gray | `#6B5E52` |
| White | Pure White | `#FFFFFF` |

### Semantic Colors
- Success: `#2D7A4F`
- Error: `#C0392B`
- Warning: `#E87020` (same as brand — reuse intentionally)

### Usage Rules
- `#E87020` — CTAs, highlights, icon accent, hover states, active nav items
- `#3B1F0A` — H1/H2 headings, nav bg (dark sections), footer bg
- `#FAF7F2` — Default page background (never pure white)
- `#F3EDE4` — Card surfaces, alternating sections
- `#1C1208` — All body text

### Rationale
Orange signals speed, energy, and warmth — exactly what "NoTime" promises. Espresso brown grounds the palette with quiet authority without feeling corporate. Cream/linen replaces clinical white with a tactile warmth that feels personal and caring — exactly the emotional register this brand needs. Competitors use cold white/gray; this palette is an instant visual differentiator.

---

## 2. TYPOGRAPHY

### Option A — Recommended: "Trustworthy Premium"

| Element | Font | Weight | Size (desktop) | Size (mobile) |
|---------|------|--------|----------------|---------------|
| H1 Hero | Playfair Display | 700 | 72px / lh 1.1 | 40px / lh 1.15 |
| H2 Section | Inter | 700 | 48px / lh 1.2 | 32px / lh 1.25 |
| H3 Card/Sub | Inter | 600 | 28px / lh 1.3 | 22px / lh 1.3 |
| Body Large | Inter | 400 | 18px / lh 1.7 | 17px / lh 1.7 |
| Body | Inter | 400 | 16px / lh 1.6 | 16px / lh 1.6 |
| Caption/Small | Inter | 500 | 13px / lh 1.5 | 12px / lh 1.5 |
| CTA Button | Inter | 600 | 16px / ls 0.02em | 16px / ls 0.02em |
| Faith Tagline | Playfair Display | 400 Italic | 14px / lh 1.6 | 13px / lh 1.6 |

### Option B — "Modern Warmth"
- **Display:** DM Serif Display (700) — softer serif, feels more approachable
- **Everything else:** DM Sans (400/600/700) — harmonious pairing, warm and friendly
- Use this if Option A feels too editorial for the target audience

### Rationale
Playfair Display in the hero creates an instant premium signal that competitors lack. All three competitors use pure sans-serif — adding a serif display font for headlines immediately elevates perceived value and makes NoTimeMover feel established and trustworthy. Inter everywhere else keeps the UI clean and readable. This combination balances "premium service" with "easy to use."

## 3. COMPONENT RECOMMENDATIONS

### Hero Section
- **Background:** Cinematic video (moving truck, golden hour). Overlay: `linear-gradient(to right, rgba(59,31,10,0.88) 35%, rgba(59,31,10,0.40) 100%)`
- **Layout:** Left-aligned text block, text on left 55% of viewport, right 45% fades to video
- **Above H1 (small text):** `"Galatians 5:13 — Serve one another through love."` in `#F9A55A` italic, 14px
- **H1:** "Your Move, Handled with Care." (Playfair Display, 72px, white)
- **Subheadline:** "Fast, careful, and faith-driven moving for families in [Region]. Free quote in 60 seconds." (Inter, 18px, #F3EDE4)
- **CTA Block:** Primary button "Get My Free Quote" (`#E87020` bg, white text, 16px Inter 600, px-8 py-4, rounded-lg) + Secondary ghost button "See Our Services" (white border, white text)
- **Trust micro-signals below CTAs:** "✓ Licensed & Insured  ✓ 4.9★ Rated  ✓ No Commitment"
- **Mobile:** Static image fallback (no video autoplay). Text centered on mobile.

### Navigation
- **On load:** Transparent, white text
- **On scroll (>80px):** White background, `#1C1208` text, `box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)`
- **Logo:** Left-aligned
- **Links (center/right):** Services | About | Reviews | Contact — Inter 500, 15px
- **Far right:** Phone number (click-to-call, `#E87020`) + "Get a Quote" button (`#E87020` bg)
- **Mobile:** Hamburger → full-screen overlay with large links and phone CTA

### Trust Bar (below hero)
- **Background:** `#F3EDE4` (linen) with top/bottom 1px border `#EDE4D8`
- **Layout:** 4 items separated by `|` dividers, horizontally centered
- **Items:** 
  - `500+ Moves Completed`
  - `4.9 ★ Average Rating`
  - `Licensed & Insured`
  - `Same-Day Availability`
- **Animation:** Numbers count up from 0 on scroll-enter (Framer Motion useInView)
- **Typography:** Inter 700, 24px for numbers, Inter 500, 13px for labels, `#3B1F0A`

### Services Section
- **Headline:** H2 "Everything You Need for a Smooth Move"
- **Sub-copy:** "From single rooms to full offices — we handle it all, carefully and quickly."
- **Layout:** 3×2 grid on desktop, 2×3 on tablet, 1-column on mobile
- **Cards:** 
  - Background: `#FFFFFF`
  - Border: `1px solid #EDE4D8`
  - Border-radius: `12px`
  - Shadow: `0 4px 24px rgba(59,31,10,0.06)`
  - Hover: `translateY(-4px)`, shadow intensifies, `2px solid #E87020` left border appears
  - Content: Icon (32px, Lucide) + H3 service name + 2-line description + "Learn More →" (`#E87020`)
- **Services:** Local Moves | Long Distance | Commercial Moves | Packing & Unpacking | Labor Only | Last-Minute Moves

### How It Works (3-Step Process)
- **Background:** `#3B1F0A` (espresso — creates visual rhythm break)
- **Headline:** "Moving Made Simple" (Playfair Display, white)
- **Layout:** 3 columns horizontal with connecting line (`#E87020` dashed line)
- **Step cards:** Dark surface `rgba(255,255,255,0.05)`, white text
- **Steps:**
  1. "Tell Us About Your Move" — form/clipboard icon
  2. "Get Your Free Quote" — price tag icon
  3. "Sit Back, We've Got It" — truck icon
- **Step number:** Large `#E87020` numeral (72px, Playfair Display, low opacity background)

### Quote Form
- **Placement:** Dedicated full-width section (light background) + sticky floating version on desktop
- **Left column:** "Get Your Free Quote" headline + 3 trust bullets + a one-sentence testimonial
- **Right column:** Form card (white, `border-radius: 16px`, warm shadow)
- **Fields:** From Address | To Address | Move Date | Move Size (Studio/1BR/2BR/3BR+/Commercial/Storage) | Full Name | Phone Number
- **Submit:** Full-width `#E87020` button "Get My Free Quote — It's Fast & Free"
- **Below button:** "We'll respond within 30 minutes. No spam, ever."
- **Input focus:** `border-color: #E87020`, subtle glow

### Testimonials
- **Layout:** Staggered 3-column masonry grid (desktop), 1-column (mobile)
- **Cards:** White background, `border-radius: 12px`, subtle shadow
- **Quote mark:** `"` in `#F9A55A`, 72px, Playfair Display, positioned top-left
- **Content:** Review text (16px body) + reviewer name (Inter 600, `#3B1F0A`) + city + 5 gold stars (⭐)
- **Avatar:** Circular initial avatar if no photo — `#FAF7F2` bg, `#E87020` text
- **Headline:** "500+ Families Trust NoTimeMover"
- **Source badges:** Google Reviews logo / Facebook logo next to reviewer

### About / Why Us Section
- **Layout:** 50/50 split — left: copy, right: photo (team photo or founder)
- **Copy:** Brand story, faith values, the "why" behind the business. Keep it personal and real. 3 short paragraphs max.
- **Faith element:** Quote "Galatians 5:13" styled as a pull-quote in amber
- **Bullets:** 3 key values with icons (e.g., "We treat your belongings like our own")
- **Background:** `#FAF7F2`

### Footer
- **Background:** `#3B1F0A`
- **Logo:** Light version (white/cream)
- **Tagline:** "Galatians 5:13 — Serve one another through love." (`#F9A55A`, italic)
- **4 columns:** Services | Quick Links | Contact | Service Areas
- **Social row:** Facebook, Instagram, Google icons (white, `#E87020` on hover)
- **Bottom bar:** "Licensed & Insured | © 2025 NoTimeMover | Privacy Policy"

---

## 4. ANIMATION & INTERACTION

### Scroll Animations (Framer Motion)
```js
// Default fade-up (use on ALL section content)
const fadeUp = {
  initial: { opacity: 0, y: 30 },
  whileInView: { opacity: 1, y: 0 },
  transition: { duration: 0.6, ease: "easeOut" },
  viewport: { once: true, margin: "-80px" }
}

// Stagger wrapper (use on card grids)
const stagger = {
  animate: { transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } }
}

// Fade from left (hero tagline, section headings)
const fadeLeft = {
  initial: { opacity: 0, x: -20 },
  animate: { opacity: 1, x: 0 },
  transition: { duration: 0.7, delay: 0.2 }
}
```

### Parallax
- Hero video: scrollY * 0.3 offset (`useScroll` + `useTransform` in Framer Motion)
- Hero text block: scrollY * 0.1 upward movement (subtle depth)
- Avoid parallax on mobile (performance + motion sickness risk)

### Count-Up Animation (Trust Bar)
```js
// Use react-countup or custom useEffect
// Trigger when element enters viewport
// Duration: 1.5s, easeOut curve
```

### Hover States
| Element | Hover Effect |
|---------|-------------|
| Service cards | `translateY(-4px)`, shadow ↑, orange left border |
| CTA buttons | `scale(1.02)`, bg darken 8% |
| Nav links | Orange underline slides from left (clip-path animation) |
| Testimonial cards | Shadow intensifies |
| Footer links | `#F9A55A` color transition |

### Micro-Interactions
- Quote form submit: Button text → spinning loader → "✓ Quote Request Sent!" (green)
- Mobile menu open: Smooth height transition + overlay fade (not slide — cleaner on mobile)
- Phone number: Subtle pulse animation on mobile (`@keyframes pulse-ring`)
- Scroll-to-top: Appears at 600px scroll, `#E87020` circle with ↑ arrow, fade-in

### Optional 3D (Subtle, Desktop Only)
- Hero text block: CSS `perspective: 1200px` — text tilts ~2° on mouse move
- Service cards: `rotateX(1.5deg) rotateY(1.5deg)` on hover (very subtle depth)
- Implementation: `onMouseMove` handler updating CSS custom properties

---

## 5. IMAGERY DIRECTION

### Photography Style
- **Mood:** Golden hour warmth. Think warm Instagram aesthetic — not cold commercial photography.
- **Color grade:** +orange/yellow tones, slightly desaturated greens, rich dark shadows. Apply via CSS `filter: saturate(1.1) contrast(1.05)` as fallback if custom grade not possible.
- **Human-centered:** Show real movers, real families, moments of care. Avoid:
  - Generic blue-uniform stock movers
  - Empty white room compositions
  - Cold, overlit "commercial" feel
- **Preferred shots:**
  - Moving truck on tree-lined street (golden hour)
  - Mover carefully wrapping/carrying furniture
  - Team members smiling, shaking hands with homeowner
  - Family walking through doorway of new home
  - Close-up of careful hands wrapping fragile item

### Video (Hero Background)
- **Spec:** MP4 (H.264) + WebM fallback, target 6–8MB compressed, 1920×1080 minimum
- **Suggested content:** 20–30 second looping sequence — truck on road → team lifting → family moment → handshake
- **Mobile:** Static image fallback (first frame of video or separate hero image)
- **Implementation:** `<video autoplay muted loop playsinline poster="hero-fallback.jpg">`
- **Free sources:** Pexels.com — search "moving truck sunset", "movers family", "moving boxes"
- **Color grade:** Apply warm overlay via CSS gradient over video

### Iconography
- **Library:** Lucide React (free, clean, consistent)
- **Style:** Rounded stroke icons, 1.5px weight
- **Size:** 40px (service cards), 32px (process steps), 24px (nav/body)
- **Colors:** `#3B1F0A` on light backgrounds, `#F9A55A` on dark backgrounds

---

## 6. LAYOUT & STRUCTURE

### Full Page Section Order
```
1.  <Nav>           — Sticky, transparent → solid on scroll
2.  <Hero>          — 100vh, video bg, left text, CTAs
3.  <TrustBar>      — 4 stats, linen bg, count-up animation
4.  <Services>      — 6-card grid, cream bg, fade-up stagger
5.  <HowItWorks>    — 3 steps, dark brown bg, visual break
6.  <QuoteForm>     — 2-column, white bg, primary conversion section
7.  <About>         — 50/50 split, story + faith, cream bg
8.  <Testimonials>  — 3-col masonry, white bg, builds final trust
9.  <ServiceAreas>  — Grid or interactive map of cities served
10. <FAQ>           — Accordion, white bg, reduces pre-form anxiety
11. <FinalCTA>      — Full-width banner, orange bg, bold headline
12. <Footer>        — Dark espresso, comprehensive
```

### Navigation Structure
```
Logo | Services ▾ | About | Reviews | FAQ | Contact | [📞 Phone] | [Get a Quote]

Services dropdown:
- Local Moves
- Long Distance
- Commercial Moves
- Packing & Unpacking
- Labor Only
- Last-Minute Moves
```

### Grid System
- Container: `max-width: 1280px`, `padding: 0 24px` (desktop), `0 16px` (mobile)
- Column grid: 12-column, 24px gap (desktop), 4-column, 16px gap (mobile)
- Section padding: `120px 0` (desktop), `72px 0` (mobile)
- Card gap: `24px` (desktop), `16px` (mobile)

---

## 7. COMPETITOR ANALYSIS SUMMARY

### What's Working — Keep These
| Pattern | Source | Why It Works |
|---------|--------|-------------|
| Phone in nav (click-to-call) | Bellhop | Moving customers often call; reduces friction |
| Stats trust bar with numbers | Bellhop | Instant social proof, reduces risk perception |
| 3-step process section | All | Reduces anxiety about complexity |
| Multiple CTAs down the page | Bellhop | Catches converters at different intent levels |
| Testimonials with full name + city | Bellhop | Specificity = credibility |
| 6-service card grid | Bellhop | Scannable, shows breadth |

### What's Not Working — Avoid These
| Anti-Pattern | Why to Avoid |
|-------------|-------------|
| Cold white/gray palette | Feels like a SaaS tool, not a personal service |
| Generic stock photography | Blue-uniform movers feel impersonal and forgettable |
| Centered hero text | Looks templated; left-aligned reads as more confident |
| Wall-of-text About sections | Target audience is stressed and skimming; nobody reads long blocks |
| No personality / no face | Competitors are faceless brands; showing real people builds trust |
| "Get an estimate" generic CTA | "Get my free quote in 60 seconds" is measurably more compelling |

### Differentiation Strategy Summary
NoTimeMover should not look like a moving company website. It should look like the moving company website. The combination of:
1. Warm golden-hour video hero (no competitor has this)
2. Faith identity (completely unique in the space)
3. Personal/team photos (real humans, real faces)
4. Warm brown/cream/orange palette (vs. cold tech blue-grays)
5. "NoTime" speed promise throughout copy

...creates a category of one. Users who are stressed about their move will feel like this company cares — because the brand signals it before a single word is read.

---

## 8. MOBILE CONSIDERATIONS

### Critical Mobile Optimizations

| Issue | Solution |
|-------|---------|
| Hero video | Static image fallback. Never autoplay video on mobile. |
| Font sizes | H1: 40px, H2: 28px, body: 16px min. No text below 13px. |
| Tap targets | Minimum 44×44px for all buttons and links |
| Sticky CTA | Fixed bottom bar on mobile: "Get a Free Quote" button (appears after 200px scroll) |
| Phone number | `<a href="tel:+1...">` styled as full-width button on mobile |
| Form fields | Single-column, large inputs (48px height), clear labels above (not placeholder-only) |
| Navigation | Full-screen hamburger overlay with 56px link height |
| Cards | Single-column stack, 16px gap, full-width |

### Mobile-First Priority Order
1. LCP <1.5s (static hero image, no render-blocking fonts)
2. Quote form reachable within 1 scroll (or sticky bottom CTA)
3. Phone number tappable above the fold
4. Trust signals (stars + reviews) visible within first viewport
5. Service cards scannable (1-column, icon + title + 1 line)
6. Sticky bottom bar: "Get a Quote" (primary) + "Call Now" (secondary)

### Sticky Mobile CTA Bar
```jsx
// Appears after 200px scroll, disappears when quote form is in view
<motion.div 
  className="fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-white border-t border-sand px-4 py-3 flex gap-3 md:hidden"
  initial={{ y: 100 }}
  animate={{ y: showBar ? 0 : 100 }}
>
  <a href="tel:+1..." className="flex-1 btn-secondary">Call Now</a>
  <a href="#quote" className="flex-1 btn-primary">Get a Quote</a>
</motion.div>
```

---

## 9. TRUST & CONVERSION ELEMENTS

### Above-the-Fold Trust Signals (Hero)
1. Star rating: "⭐ 4.9 — Trusted by 500+ families" (below subheadline)
2. "✓ Licensed & Insured" | "✓ Background-Checked Team" | "✓ No Commitment"
3. Galatians 5:13 tagline (above H1) — signals values before a word is read

### CTA Hierarchy
| Level | CTA Text | Color | Placement |
|-------|----------|-------|-----------|
| Primary | "Get My Free Quote" | `#E87020` button | Hero, mid-page, final banner |
| Secondary | "Call Us Now — [Phone]" | White/ghost | Hero, nav, sticky mobile bar |
| Tertiary | "See Our Services" | Ghost/outlined | Hero (low commitment entry) |

### Social Proof Placement
| Section | Social Proof Element |
|---------|---------------------|
| Hero | "Trusted by 500+ families" + star rating |
| Trust Bar | Stats: moves, rating, license, availability |
| About | Google rating badge + review count |
| Testimonials | 6–9 detailed reviews with names + cities |
| Footer | Google Business / Facebook review badge links |

### Conversion Friction Reducers
- "No commitment. Free in 60 seconds." below quote form submit button
- "We'll respond within 30 minutes" sets clear expectation
- "No spam, ever." reduces email/phone anxiety
- "Get a Quote" in nav is persistent throughout the browsing journey

---

## 10. TECHNICAL RECOMMENDATIONS

### Stack
- **Framework:** Next.js 14 (App Router) — best-in-class performance, Vercel-native
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS — utility-first, consistent, fast to build
- **Animation:** Framer Motion — scroll animations, page transitions, micro-interactions
- **Forms:** React Hook Form + Zod validation — clean, performant
- **Deployment:** Vercel — global CDN, automatic image optimization, edge delivery

### Performance Targets
| Metric | Target |
|--------|--------|
| LCP (Largest Contentful Paint) | <1.8s |
| CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift) | <0.05 |
| FID / INP | <100ms |
| Total page weight | <1.5MB (above fold: <500KB) |
| Hero video size | <8MB (compressed H.264 + WebM) |

### Performance Implementation
- Fonts: `next/font` (self-hosted Google Fonts — prevents FOUT, eliminates external request)
- Images: `next/image` — automatic WebP, lazy loading, responsive sizing
- Video: `<video autoplay muted loop playsinline poster="hero.jpg">` — static poster loads instantly
- Mobile video: Detect `(prefers-reduced-motion)` and screen width; show static image below 768px
- Code splitting: Lazy-load below-fold sections with `dynamic(() => import(...), { ssr: false })`

### SEO Configuration
```
Page title: "NoTimeMover | Trusted Moving Company in [City] | Free Quote"
Meta description: "Fast, careful, faith-driven moving services in [Region]. 4.9★ rated. 
Licensed & insured. Get a free quote in 60 seconds. Local & long-distance moves."

Schema markup: LocalBusiness, Service, FAQPage
H1: "[City] Moving Company — Fast, Careful & Faith-Driven"
Canonical URLs, sitemap.xml, robots.txt

Service pages to build:
/local-moving
/long-distance-moving  
/commercial-moving
/packing-services
/labor-only
```

### Accessibility
- All text: WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1 minimum)
- Focus states: `outline: 2px solid #E87020`, `outline-offset: 2px` on all interactive elements
- Video: `aria-hidden="true"` on background video, `role="presentation"`
- Images: Descriptive alt text on all `<img>` elements
- Form: Labels above inputs (not placeholder-only), ARIA error messages
- Keyboard navigation: Logical tab order, skip-to-content link

---

## 11. CURSOR BUILD PROMPT

**Paste this entire prompt into Cursor to build the NoTimeMover website:**

---

```
Build a complete, production-ready website for NoTimeMover, a faith-based residential and 
commercial moving company. Use Next.js 14 (App Router), Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.

=== TECH STACK ===
- Next.js 14 with App Router
- Tailwind CSS (extend theme with custom colors below)
- Framer Motion for all animations
- Lucide React for icons
- React Hook Form + Zod for quote form
- next/font for typography (Google Fonts)
- next/image for all images

=== COLOR SYSTEM (tailwind.config.ts) ===
colors: {
  brand: {
    orange: '#E87020',
    orangeDark: '#C55E15',
    brown: '#3B1F0A',
    mahogany: '#6B3A1F',
    amber: '#F9A55A',
  },
  neutral: {
    cream: '#FAF7F2',
    linen: '#F3EDE4',
    sand: '#EDE4D8',
    body: '#1C1208',
    muted: '#6B5E52',
  }
}

=== TYPOGRAPHY ===
Fonts (via next/font/google):
- Display: Playfair Display (weights: 400, 400italic, 700)
- UI: Inter (weights: 400, 500, 600, 700)

Type scale (Tailwind custom):
- h1: 72px desktop / 40px mobile, Playfair Display 700, line-height 1.1
- h2: 48px desktop / 32px mobile, Inter 700, line-height 1.2
- h3: 28px desktop / 22px mobile, Inter 600, line-height 1.3
- body-lg: 18px, Inter 400, line-height 1.7
- body: 16px, Inter 400, line-height 1.6
- caption: 13px, Inter 500, line-height 1.5
- tagline: 14px, Playfair Display 400 italic (for faith tagline)

=== PAGE STRUCTURE (in order) ===

1. STICKY NAVIGATION
- Transparent on load → white bg on scroll (>80px)
- Logo left | Links center (Services, About, Reviews, FAQ, Contact) | CTA right
- Right side: phone number in brand-orange (click-to-call) + "Get a Quote" button (orange bg)
- On scroll: add box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)
- Mobile: hamburger → full-screen overlay menu, large touch targets

2. HERO SECTION (full 100vh)
- Background: <video autoplay muted loop playsinline> with cinematic moving truck footage
- Overlay gradient: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(59,31,10,0.88) 35%, rgba(59,31,10,0.40) 100%)
- Mobile: show static poster image instead of video
- Content (left-aligned, max-w-2xl):
  * Faith tagline (above H1): "Galatians 5:13 — Serve one another through love." 
    → font: Playfair Display italic, color: #F9A55A, 14px
    → Framer Motion: fadeLeft, 300ms delay
  * H1: "Your Move, Handled with Care." 
    → Playfair Display 700, 72px, white
    → Framer Motion: fadeUp, 500ms delay
  * Subheadline: "Fast, careful, and faith-driven moving for families in [Region]. 
    Free quote in 60 seconds."
    → Inter 400, 18px, #F3EDE4
    → Framer Motion: fadeUp, 700ms delay
  * CTA row:
    - Primary: "Get My Free Quote" button (bg: #E87020, text: white, px-8 py-4, rounded-lg, Inter 600)
    - Secondary: "See Our Services" ghost button (border white, text white)
  * Trust micro-row: "✓ Licensed & Insured  ✓ 4.9★ Rated  ✓ No Commitment"
    → Inter 500, 14px, rgba(255,255,255,0.8)
- Scroll indicator: animated chevron-down, white, absolute bottom-8

3. TRUST BAR (below hero)
- Background: #F3EDE4, border-top/bottom: 1px solid #EDE4D8
- Padding: 28px 0
- 4 items separated by vertical dividers:
  * "500+ Moves Completed" | "4.9 ★ Average Rating" | "Licensed & Insured" | "Same-Day Available"
- Numbers animate count-up from 0 when scrolled into view (useInView + custom counter hook)
- Typography: number = Inter 700 28px #3B1F0A, label = Inter 500 13px #6B5E52

4. SERVICES SECTION
- Background: #FAF7F2
- Headline: "Everything You Need for a Smooth Move" (H2, #3B1F0A)
- Sub: "From single rooms to full offices — handled carefully, every time."
- 3×2 grid (desktop), 2×3 (tablet), 1-col (mobile), gap-6
- Cards: bg white, border 1px #EDE4D8, rounded-xl, p-8, shadow-sm
- Card hover: translateY(-4px), shadow-md, border-left-4 #E87020
- Each card: Lucide icon (40px, #3B1F0A) + H3 + 2-line description + "Learn More →" (#E87020)
- Services: Local Moves, Long Distance, Commercial Moves, Packing & Unpacking, Labor Only, Last-Minute
- Framer Motion: stagger children 0.1s, each card fadeUp

5. HOW IT WORKS
- Background: #3B1F0A (full width)
- Headline: "Moving Made Simple" (Playfair Display 700, white, centered)
- 3 columns with dashed #E87020 connecting line between them
- Each step: large step number (#E87020, Playfair Display 72px, opacity 20%), icon (Lucide, white, 48px), title (Inter 600, white, 22px), description (Inter 400, rgba(255,255,255,0.75), 16px)
- Steps: 1. Tell Us About Your Move / 2. Get Your Free Quote / 3. Sit Back, We've Got It
- Framer Motion: stagger fadeUp

6. QUOTE FORM SECTION (id="quote")
- Background: white
- 2-column layout (60/40):
  * Left: "Get Your Free Quote" H2 + 3 trust bullet points + 1 testimonial pullquote
  * Right: Form card (bg white, border 1px #EDE4D8, rounded-2xl, p-8, shadow-lg)
- Form fields (React Hook Form + Zod):
  * From Address (text input)
  * To Address (text input)  
  * Move Date (date input)
  * Move Size (select: Studio / 1 Bedroom / 2 Bedrooms / 3+ Bedrooms / Commercial)
  * Full Name (text)
  * Phone Number (tel)
- All inputs: border #EDE4D8, focus-visible: border #E87020 + ring #E87020/20
- Submit button: full-width, bg #E87020, text white, rounded-lg, py-4, Inter 600
- Below button: "No commitment. We'll respond within 30 minutes." (caption, muted)

7. ABOUT / WHY NOTIME
- Background: #FAF7F2
- 50/50 grid: left = copy block, right = team/founder photo
- Content: 2 short paragraphs about the company + faith values
- Pull-quote: "Galatians 5:13" styled prominently in #E87020, Playfair italic
- 3 value bullets with Lucide icons (#E87020)

8. TESTIMONIALS
- Background: white
- Headline: "500+ Families Trust NoTimeMover" (H2, centered)
- 3-column masonry grid (desktop), 1-col (mobile), gap-6
- Cards: bg white, border 1px #EDE4D8, rounded-xl, p-8
- Opening " mark: Playfair Display, 64px, #F9A55A, absolute top-left of card
- Review text: Inter 400, 16px, #1C1208
- Reviewer: name (Inter 600, #3B1F0A) + city (caption, muted) + 5 star icons (#E87020)
- Avatar: if no photo, circular with initials (bg #FAF7F2, text #E87020)
- Framer Motion: stagger 0.15s, fadeUp

9. SERVICE AREAS
- Background: #F3EDE4
- Headline: "Serving [Region] and Surrounding Areas"
- Grid of city/area chips (rounded-full, bg white, border #EDE4D8, Inter 500 14px)

10. FAQ ACCORDION
- Background: white
- Headline: "Common Questions"
- 6-8 questions as Radix UI Accordion (or custom)
- Question: Inter 600, 17px, #1C1208
- Answer: Inter 400, 16px, #6B5E52
- Expand icon: chevron, #E87020, rotates on open
- Border between items: 1px #EDE4D8

11. FINAL CTA BANNER
- Background: linear-gradient(135deg, #E87020 0%, #C55E15 100%)
- Centered text: H2 "Ready to Make Your Move?" (white, Playfair Display)
- Sub: "Get your free quote now — no commitment, no stress." (white, Inter)
- Big white button: "Get My Free Quote" → links to #quote

12. FOOTER
- Background: #3B1F0A
- Logo (white version) + "Galatians 5:13 — Serve one another through love." (#F9A55A italic)
- 4-column grid: Services | Quick Links | Contact | Follow Us
- All links: #EDE4D8 → hover #F9A55A
- Social icons: Facebook, Instagram (Lucide, #6B5E52 → hover #E87020)
- Bottom bar: divider + "Licensed & Insured | © 2025 NoTimeMover | Privacy Policy" (caption, #6B5E52)

=== FRAMER MOTION CONFIG ===
// Global animation variants (create variants.ts)
export const fadeUp = {
  initial: { opacity: 0, y: 32 },
  whileInView: { opacity: 1, y: 0 },
  transition: { duration: 0.6, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] },
  viewport: { once: true, margin: "-80px" }
}

export const staggerContainer = {
  animate: { transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } }
}

export const fadeLeft = {
  initial: { opacity: 0, x: -24 },
  animate: { opacity: 1, x: 0 },
  transition: { duration: 0.7, ease: "easeOut" }
}

// Hero video parallax
const { scrollY } = useScroll()
const heroY = useTransform(scrollY, [0, 600], [0, 180])

=== MOBILE-SPECIFIC COMPONENTS ===
// Sticky bottom CTA bar (mobile only, appears after 200px scroll)
<motion.div 
  className="fixed bottom-0 inset-x-0 z-50 bg-white border-t border-sand px-4 py-3 
             flex gap-3 md:hidden"
  initial={{ y: 80 }}
  animate={{ y: showBar ? 0 : 80 }}
  transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
>
  <a href="tel:+1XXXXXXXXXX" className="flex-1 rounded-lg border-2 border-brand-orange 
    text-brand-orange font-semibold text-center py-3">
    Call Now
  </a>
  <a href="#quote" className="flex-1 rounded-lg bg-brand-orange text-white 
    font-semibold text-center py-3">
    Get a Quote
  </a>
</motion.div>

=== RESPONSIVE BREAKPOINTS ===
- mobile: 0–767px (default, mobile-first)
- tablet: 768–1023px (md:)
- desktop: 1024px+ (lg:)
- wide: 1280px+ (xl:) — max-width container

=== PERFORMANCE REQUIREMENTS ===
- Use next/image for ALL images with proper width/height/sizes props
- Use next/font for Playfair Display and Inter
- Hero: <video> with poster (static image) — hide video on mobile (hidden md:block)
- Lazy load all sections below the fold with Framer Motion viewport detection
- Target LCP < 2s, no layout shift

=== FILE STRUCTURE ===
app/
  layout.tsx (fonts, metadata, global styles)
  page.tsx (home page — compose all sections)
  globals.css (Tailwind directives + custom CSS variables)
components/
  nav/Navbar.tsx
  hero/Hero.tsx
  sections/TrustBar.tsx
  sections/Services.tsx
  sections/HowItWorks.tsx
  sections/QuoteForm.tsx
  sections/About.tsx
  sections/Testimonials.tsx
  sections/ServiceAreas.tsx
  sections/FAQ.tsx
  sections/FinalCTA.tsx
  layout/Footer.tsx
  ui/Button.tsx (primary + secondary + ghost variants)
lib/
  variants.ts (Framer Motion variants)
  utils.ts
tailwind.config.ts
```
